raw:
# Learning Loop — 2026-06-01

## Learnings
- Enterprise buyers ask for SSO before pricing. (granola:acme-2026-06-01)

## Hypotheses
- Churn is driven by week-1 onboarding friction. (granola:qbr-2026-05-30)

## Decisions
- Adopt usage-based pricing for the self-serve tier. (granola:pricing-2026-05-29)

## Tasks
- Send Acme the signed MSA → Linear. (granola:acme-2026-06-01)
